creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #1)

The option is off by default :)

And that seems to be the problem with Rust-Cargo itself.
https://github.com/rust-lang/cargo/issues/5045
I sent an email to yuri regarding a workaround.

I think it is something that there is no particular problem with committing as it is.
